description: Rewrite Ngepet data models, ApiService endpoints, and GamesRepository to match the actual API specification. The current implementation uses placeholder models (NgepetMatch with int id, simple players list) that do not match the real API (UUID match ids, complex objects with avatars, intruders, items, hidden items, events, leaderboards, and avatar shop system).
steps: Replace the existing Ngepet models in GameModels.kt (NgepetMatch, NgepetMatchesResponse, NgepetChoiceRequest, NgepetGuessRequest) with comprehensive models matching the actual API. Required models: NgepetLobbyMatch (id:String UUID, host_name, house_avatar_id, token_pool, total_token_pool, min_intruder_token, max_intruder_token, difficulty, guess_duration_hours, max_intruders, status, intruders_count, house_avatar:NgepetAvatar?), NgepetAvatar (id, name, image_url, tier, type?, price?, stock?, own?), NgepetMatchesListResponse (status, matches:List<NgepetLobbyMatch>), NgepetActiveMatchResponse (status, data:NgepetActiveMatchData?, token:String?), NgepetActiveMatchData (match_id, role, status, token_pool, host_name, intruders_count, max_intruders, intruder_match_id?), NgepetMatchDetail (match with full details including items list, intruders list, events, hidden_items), NgepetMatchItem (name, image_url), NgepetIntruder (id, intruder_name, avatar_id, status, intruders_at, guess_deadline, is_pick_choice, result, token_pool, avatar:NgepetAvatar?), NgepetEvent (role, details, created_at), NgepetHiddenItem (id, status, result), NgepetCreateMatchRequest (host_name, difficulty, guess_duration_hours, max_intruders, token_pool, min_intruder_token?, max_intruder_token?, house_avatar_id?), NgepetCreateMatchResponse (status, message, id), NgepetJoinRequest (name, token_amount, avatar_id?), NgepetSubmitChoiceRequest (item_name), NgepetHostGuessRequest (match_intruder_id, item_name), NgepetHiddenGuessRequest (match_intruder_id, item_name), NgepetGuessResponse (status, is_correct, is_end, answer_item?), NgepetClaimVictoryRequest (match_intruder_id), NgepetAvatarShopResponse (status, data:List<NgepetAvatar>), NgepetOwnedAvatarItem (id, avatar_id, is_equipped, avatar:NgepetAvatar), NgepetOwnedAvatarsResponse (status, data:List<NgepetOwnedAvatarItem>), NgepetHistoryItem (match_id, host_name, status, role, match_result, created_at), NgepetHistoryResponse (status, data:List<NgepetHistoryItem>), NgepetLeaderboardEntry (name or host_name, wins, total_matches or token_pool, winrate?)

Rewrite the Ngepet section of ApiService.kt to define all endpoints: GET ngepet/match (list), GET ngepet/match/active, GET ngepet/match/history, GET ngepet/match/{id} (detail with String path), POST ngepet/match/create (with body NgepetCreateMatchRequest), POST ngepet/match/{id}/close, POST ngepet/match/{id}/hidden-item (body with item_name), POST ngepet/match/{id}/guess (body NgepetHostGuessRequest), POST ngepet/match/{id}/join (body NgepetJoinRequest), POST ngepet/match/{id}/submit-choice (body NgepetSubmitChoiceRequest), POST ngepet/match/{id}/hidden-guess (body NgepetHiddenGuessRequest), POST ngepet/match/claim-victory (body NgepetClaimVictoryRequest), GET ngepet/avatar (shop), POST ngepet/avatar/{id}/buy, GET ngepet/avatar/own, POST ngepet/avatar/{id}/equip, GET ngepet/leaderboard/house, GET ngepet/leaderboard/host, GET ngepet/leaderboard/intruders. All match path params are String type (UUIDs).

Rewrite the Ngepet section of GamesRepository.kt to add repository functions for all endpoints following the existing pattern (api call, Result<T> wrapper, parseErrorMessage for errors). Functions needed: getNgepetMatches, getNgepetActiveMatch, getNgepetMatchHistory, getNgepetMatchDetail(id:String), createNgepetMatch(request), closeNgepetMatch(id:String), hideTokenInItem(matchId:String, itemName:String), hostGuess(matchId:String, request:NgepetHostGuessRequest), joinNgepetMatch(matchId:String, request:NgepetJoinRequest), submitNgepetChoice(matchId:String, itemName:String), intruderHiddenGuess(matchId:String, request:NgepetHiddenGuessRequest), claimVictory(request:NgepetClaimVictoryRequest), getAvatarShop, buyAvatar(id:Int), getOwnedAvatars, equipAvatar(id:Int), getHouseLeaderboard, getHostLeaderboard, getIntruderLeaderboard.
acceptance_criteria: All new data classes compile without errors
ApiService contains all 17+ Ngepet endpoints with correct HTTP methods, paths, and body types
GamesRepository contains wrapper functions for all endpoints following the existing Result<T> pattern
The project compiles successfully with assembleDebug
verification: Run: export JAVA_HOME=/root/.local/share/mise/installs/java/17.0.2 && export PATH=$JAVA_HOME/bin:$PATH && cd /projects/sandbox/Mobile-Apps/MysticNusa && ./gradlew assembleDebug
